`buchecha` is a Go command-line tool that drives a coding AI (such as Claude Code, Codex, or Gemini) through a Markdown specification, implementing one phase at a time in an automated loop. After each phase the agent commits its changes and appends a structured journal entry, which the outer loop parses to decide whether to keep going, stop with success, or escalate to a human. The project replaces the opaque shell scripts that usually power these "loop until done" workflows with a single observable binary that ships a live status dashboard.
